title: BUbreakingHeadlines
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Officers who killed Austin gunman won't face charges
items.description: Travis County DA Jose Garza said Tuesday that suggestions that he would seek charges in the killing were "intentionally false" and political in nature...

items.title: Iran live updates: Ground troops 'not part of the plan,' Leavitt says
items.description: IDF airstrikes targeted "dozens" of sites connected to internal security forces.

items.title: WATCH:  US sub sinks Iranian ship by torpedo in Indian Ocean, 1st such attack since WWII
items.description: A U.S. submarine used a torpedo to sink and Iranian ship in the Indian Ocean Tuesday, the first such attack since WWII , the Pentagon said.

items.title: US soldiers who died in the Iran war remembered for their service and devotion to their families
items.description: Four of the six U.S. soldiers killed in the Iran war have been identified by the Pentagon as members of the Army Reserve.

items.title: Hegseth says U.S. "just getting started" as Iran war spreads
items.description: The U.S. is "accelerating, not decelerating" war on Iran, Hegseth says, as strikes intensify in the region and reach 1,000 miles away.
